description.value:
When you choose this Inquiry at 3rd Level you gain Mastery in Demolitions and Trappers Kits. 

They each gain additional charges equal to your Intelligence Modifier. 

When you make a Ninja Tool with your Demolitions Kit you can expend an additional charge per Ninja Tool made and increase the damage die and save DC by 1. 

When you create a Trap with your Trappers Kit, you can spend an additional charge to increase the damage die and save DC by 2. 

Additionally, you use your wits to create unique effects for your tools and traps. 

When you create a Ninja Tool or a trap with your toolkits, you can spend any remaining Creation Points to upgrade its effect with a Mechanization. 

You can have a number of Mechanizations equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

These Mechanizations use your Ninjutsu Save DC and require you to spend a bonus action to arm and activate, spending the CCD Drain. 

A Mechanization remains armed for one minute. 

Mechanization are listed at the end of this subclass and The creation points spent on a Mechanization are returned once it is consumed or dismantled.
